channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: La dernière montre connectée blindée d’IA de Xiaomi baisse déjà fortement son prix sur Amazon
item.description: Capteur qui lui permet de réagir à des gestes spécifiques, autonomie généreuse, multitude de fonctions sport et santé... Pour sa Watch 5, Xiaomi n'a pas fait les choses à moitié. Et, aujourd'hui, Amazon la propose en plus à 275,60 euros au lieu de 359,99 euros.

item.title: Vélo de ville électrique : les 5 raisons pour lesquelles les Français l’ont boudé en 2025
item.description: Des chiffres de l’Observatoire du cycle 2025, ressort une baisse marquante : les vélos électriques de ville ont reculé de 29 % l’an passé, pour atteindre 105 000 unités. L’Union Sport & Cycle a présenté des raisons pour le moins rationnelles face à cette dégringolade.

item.title: Ce robot Sony met une raclée aux joueurs professionnels de ping-pong
item.description: Neuf caméras, huit articulations et zéro état d'âme. Le robot Ace de Sony AI vient de battre des joueurs professionnels de tennis de table en conditions officielles.

item.title: Nothing introduces an AI-powered dictation tool
item.description: Nothing's new on-device dictation tool supports over 100 languages.

item.title: La Chine clone-t-elle l’IA américaine ? La Maison-Blanche accuse son rival de pillage industriel
item.description: La Maison-Blanche vient de lancer un véritable pavé dans la mare technologique. Selon un mémorandum interne fraîchement dévoilé, des entreprises chinoises mènent des campagnes de piratage à l'échelle industrielle pour cloner les intelligences artificielles américaines. Au cœur de cette guerre de l'ombre, une technique redoutable permet de copier des géants comme ChatGPT ou Claude à moindres frais. ...

item.title: DeepSeek previews new AI model that ‘closes the gap’ with frontier models
item.description: DeepSeek says both models are more efficient and performant than DeepSeek V3.2 due to architectural improvements, and have almost "closed the gap" with current leading models, both open and closed, on reasoning benchmarks.

item.title: SpaceX is reportedly set to make its own GPUs — but don't think it'll be competing with Nvidia's GeForce cards
item.description: Don't think you'll be putting a SpaceX Falcon GPU in your gaming PC rather than an Nvidia, AMD or Intel graphics card.

item.title: Le BYD Great Tang est le 16° SUV de la marque : voici en quoi il se démarque des autres
item.description: BYD dévoile le Great Tang EV au Salon de Pékin 2026 : un imposant SUV positionné sur le segment premium, avec une autonomie annoncée de 950 km et une recharge ultra-rapide. Une énième offensive de BYD sur son marché intérieur où la concurrence ne faiblit pas, bien au contraire.

item.title: Officials charge a U.S. soldier for using intel on this $400K Polymarket bet
item.description: Gannon Ken Van Dyke tapped into classified intelligence to win a bet on the capture of President Nicolás Maduro. A U.S. special forces soldier involved in the military operation to capture Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro has been charged with using classified information about the mission to win more than $400,000 in an online betting market, federal officials announced Thursday.Gannon Ken Van Dyke was part of the operation to capture Maduro in January and used his access to classified information to make money on the prediction market site Polymarket, the federal prosecutor’s office in Ne...

item.title: Urbain, cargo, VTT, gravel : quels sont les types de vélos électriques les plus vendus en France en 2025 ? Voici tous les chiffres
item.description: Bien qu’en fort recul, le marché du vélo électrique reste très hétérogène en 2025 : les cargos et VTC résistent au détriment des modèles urbains, tandis que le route-gravel progresse.

item.title: DJI Mic Mini 2 vs Mic Mini : ce qui change vraiment entre les deux micros sans fil à moins de 100 euros de DJI
item.description: DJI lance le Mic Mini 2 le 28 avril, à partir de 33 €. Même format bouton, dix façades colorées, trois presets audio. Suffisant pour justifier un « 2 » dans le nom ? C'est tout le débat.

item.title: A new Republican privacy bill could be ‘worse than no standard at all’
item.description: Congress is once again attempting to pass a national data privacy law. But while it would introduce new protections in some states, it would weaken privacy rights in others - and it's missing several elements that privacy advocates deem necessary. The SECURE Data Act is the product of a Republican data privacy working group led […]

item.title: I watched the first 6 episodes of Widow's Bay on Apple TV — and the dark comedy horror show had me coming back for the humor, but not the frights
item.description: Widow's Bay is Apple's most unusual TV series since Severance — but it's no Twin Peaks.

item.title: 85% of enterprises are running AI agents. Only 5% trust them enough to ship.
item.description: Eighty-five percent of enterprises are running AI agent pilots, but only 5% have moved those agents into production. In an exclusive interview at RSA Conference 2026, Cisco President and Chief Product Officer Jeetu Patel said that the gap comes down to one thing: trust — and that closing it separates market dominance from bankruptcy. He also disclosed a mandate that will reshape Cisco's 90,000-person engineering organization.The problem is not rogue agents. The problem is the absence of a trust architecture.The trust deficit behind a 5% production rateA recent Cisco survey of major enterprise ...

item.title: NASA made a typeface using satellite images of the Earth
item.description: Spell your name in landscape photography taken from space. NASA is looking not to the stars but back to our planet for inspiration.

item.title: Widows Bay review: Your new favorite TV town awaits in this tremendous horror comedy
item.description: Apple TV's "Widow's Bay" stars Matthew Rhys and Stephen Root as residents of a cursed island. It's one of 2026's strongest new shows.

item.title: Leapmotor B05 Ultra : pourquoi l’Europe sera privée de cette sportive électrique à 15 000 €
item.description: Leapmotor profite du Salon de Pékin pour lancer sa B05 Ultra, version gentiment énervée de sa voiture électrique compacte. Seul souci : elle ne devrait pas faire le voyage jusqu'en Europe.

item.title: Le bon smartphone écoresponsable Fairphone 6 revient avec une belle baisse de prix
item.description: Avec son Fairphone 6, la marque néerlandaise est enfin parvenue à proposer un smartphone modulaire, réparable, mais aussi doté d’une fiche technique bien plus actuelle. Lancé l'année dernière, ce smartphone éthique peut actuellement vous revenir à 399,99 euros au lieu de 599,99 euros.

item.title: Le Vice-Président d’Apple Music affirme que le Lossless n’apporte rien
item.description: Oliver Schusser, vice-président d’Apple Music, s’est étendu sur la tendance des plateformes de streaming à adopter le Lossless. Un format qui, selon lui, n’apporterait aucune différence audible pour la majorité des utilisateurs, contrairement à l’audio spatial.

item.title: Le vélo (électrique) continue de dégringoler en France : les chiffres inquiétants de l’année 2025
item.description: L’Union Sport & Cycle a présenté l’Observatoire du Cycle 2025 à l’occasion du salon Vélo in Paris. Mauvaise nouvelle : pour la 4e année consécutive, les chiffres de ventes du cycle en France reculent. Les vélos électriques ont été particulièrement touchés par la conjoncture, avec une baisse de 16 % (507 000 ventes).

item.title: Tech layoffs update: Meta, Nike, Snap, and others join the growing list of companies slashing jobs in April 2026
item.description: Pushes for efficiency and spending on AI continue to be the through line for many of the large companies laying off workers this month. April is shaping up to be yet another brutal month for job cuts in the technology sector. But the announcements may not have the immediate effect that many companies are hoping for. Here’s the latest on the situation....

item.title: JBL affine la signature sonore de ses casques phares avec une mise à jour gratuite
item.description: Une fois n’est pas coutume, JBL déploie une mise à jour logicielle pour ses modèles Tour One M3 et Tour Pro 3, revoyant en profondeur sa signature sonore baptisée JBL Curve. Évolution majeure, ou pur discours marketing ?

item.title: Rising fuel costs are triggering flight cancellations. What to do if your trip is impacted
item.description: There are passenger protections but they vary widely depending on where travelers are flying. Airlines worldwide have begun canceling flights as the war in the Middle East strains jet fuel supplies and pushes up prices — but the disruption doesn’t end there.For travelers, it can mean having to navigate a confusing web of passenger protections that vary widely depending on where they’re flying.And the timing is amplifying the impact.“These pressures are arriving at a time when summer travel demand is ramping up, with major events such as the World Cup expected to put additional strain on airpo...

item.title: N’achetez pas de smartphone reconditionné directement sur le site de Samsung
item.description: Après un retour remarqué sur le marché du reconditionné en janvier dernier, Samsung continue d’étoffer son catalogue de mobiles de seconde main avec les Z Fold 7 et Z Flip 7 vendus… souvent plus chers que les modèles neufs.

item.title: 'No stability fixes? Is this even an update?' — New PS5 software update is a big one, adding... more emoji message reactions?
item.description: Sony has released a new PlayStation 5 software update, and it's pretty underwhelming to say the least.

item.title: Why brands should ignore Trump’s latest loyalty test
item.description: The president is applauding companies that don’t claim a tariff refund. But putting the administration over customers is a shortsighted way to do business. Earlier this week, in a live interview on CNBC’s Squawk Box, President Donald Trump was asked for his reaction to reports that Apple, Amazon, and some other companies had not filed refund requests for tariffs they paid over the past year—tariffs the Supreme Court has ruled unconstitutional. ...

item.title: Engadget Podcast: Tim Cook’s Apple era and what lies ahead for John Ternus
item.description: The Apple rumors were true, once again. This week, the company announced that Tim Cook will be stepping down from his CEO role on September 1. Replacing him will be John Ternus, who currently serves as Apple's SVP of hardware engineering. In this episode, Devindra and Engadget's Nathan Ingraham discuss Cook's legacy as Apple's CEO, and pontificate about how Ternus may change things. We're going from Apple being led by a logistics guru, to Apple being driven by a product and engineering wizard. Surely, that will have some impact on future products.Subscribe!iTunesSpotifyPocket CastsStitcherGoog...

item.title: This Firefox vulnerability may have been tracking all your private Tor identities – even in Private Mode
item.description: Researchers found a bug where websites could create a hidden ID and track users even in Private Mode.

item.title: The Xiaomi 17 Ultra is the best Xiaomi phone yet and one of the best camera phones I've ever tested
item.description: Innovative camera upgrades lead the charge, but the Xiaomi 17 Ultra is an all-round powerhouse in the flagship phone space.

item.title: Meilleurs smartphones Samsung reconditionné : quel modèle choisir en 2026 ?
item.description: Envie d'un téléphone Samsung Galaxy sans pour autant vous ruiner ? Le reconditionné est là ! Mais lequel choisir ? Nous avons sélectionné pour vous différents modèles pour vous aider à savoir quel est le meilleur Samsung reconditionné à acheter selon votre budget.

item.title: AI traders are already testing prediction markets—and losing money
item.description: A new study of frontier models on Kalshi and Polymarket finds consistent losses, even as early signs suggest more autonomous systems could eventually outperform human bettors. Prediction markets Kalshi and Polymarket have roared into the public consciousness, drawing scrutiny from regulators and politicians. They’ve also captured the imagination of social media users, some of whom post outlandish claims of striking it rich by pointing AI models at prediction markets and making bank....

item.title: Elon Musk says Teslas Cybercab has started production
item.description: Tesla's Cybercab has started production, according to CEO Elon Musk.

item.title: Dyson PencilVac Review (2026): Limited but Handy
item.description: Dyson’s newest stick vacuum has a fresh, streamlined look and some limitations. But I still keep reaching for it.

item.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court showdown will dish the dirt
item.description: Elon Musk cofounded OpenAI, and then flounced off in a huff when he wasn't anointed CEO, leaving Sam Altman as the last power-hungry man standing. Now, Musk is back with a lawsuit, and a trial is scheduled to start in Oakland, California, on April 27th. Theoretically, it's a legal case about whether OpenAI defrauded Musk. […]

item.title: In another wild turn for AI chips, Meta signs deal for millions of Amazon AI CPUs
item.description: Meta has commandeered a big chunk of Amazon's homegrown CPUs (not GPUs) for AI agentic workloads, signaling that a new kind of chip race has begun.

item.title: I used Vantrue’s unique thermal imaging dash cam in my car for two weeks — but I was more impressed with its huge touchscreen and easy Apple CarPlay and Android Auto compatibility for older cars
item.description: Three standard views from the Vantrue Pilot 2 dash cam are a boon, but the external thermal-imaging camera seems like more of a gimmick.

item.title: Partenariat massif entre Coros et Wahoo : ce que ça change pour le cyclisme connecté
item.description: Coros, connu pour ses montres de sport, s'est associé à l'une des marques de référence de l'entraînement en cyclisme, Wahoo. Un partenariat qui s'organise autour de trois axes.

item.title: DeepSeek promises its new AI model has 'world-class' reasoning
item.description: DeepSeek has released its latest AI models, the V4 Pro and Flash versions, a bit over a year after it went viral and became the top rated free app on Apple's App Store in the US. “Welcome to the era of cost-effective 1 million context length,” DeepSeek said in its announcement. Context length is what you call the maximum number of tokens that an AI model can remember, so the bigger it is, the more coherent and consistent an AI is when it comes to extended conversations. OpenAI’s recently announced GPT‑5.5 has a context window ranging from 400,000 to 1 million, for instance.The new model is sti...

item.title: ‘The iPhone is actually not getting disrupted by AI at all’: Perplexity CEO dismisses talk that Apple losing out in the AI race
item.description: Perplexity’s CEO says that far from losing the AI race, Apple has plenty of advantages.

item.title: 'Price increase of at least 10%' rumored for SSDs — but fresh CPU price hikes could be much worse
item.description: Think SSDs are way too pricey? Rumor suggests storage will soon be more expensive, sadly.

item.title: DeepSeek, Moonshot, MiniMax : la Maison Blanche accuse la Chine de voler l’IA américaine
item.description: La Maison Blanche accuse des entités principalement basées en Chine de mener des campagnes délibérées pour piller les modèles d'IA américains les plus avancés. L'attaque intervient à quelques semaines du sommet Trump-Xi à Pékin.
